description: A line chart on a white background titled In both terms, Trump slashed refugee admissions by 90%, with the subtitle Number of refugees admitted from abroad, Oct. 2016 - Mar. 2026. A blue line with shaded area tracks monthly values from 0 to about 14K across years labeled from Jan 18 to Jan 26, with vertical divider lines marked Obama, Trump and Biden at administration transitions. A Cato Institute logo appears at the lower right and a source line runs along the bottom.
notable_text: In both terms, Trump slashed refugee admissions by 90%; Number of refugees admitted from abroad, Oct. 2016 - Mar. 2026; CATO INSTITUTE
